tests.scenario: Access meditation content without ads
tests.expected_result: The meditation session plays without displaying any ads

tests.scenario: Verify no payment request for meditation content
steps: Attempt to access a meditation session behind a potential paywall
tests.expected_result: The app does not prompt for payment or display a paywall to access the meditation content

tests.scenario: Donate button is displayed
tests.expected_result: The 'Donate' button is visible and clearly labeled

tests.scenario: Successful donation
tests.expected_result: The donation is processed successfully and a confirmation message is displayed

tests.scenario: Playback continues when screen is locked
steps: Start a sleep session with calming audio
tests.expected_result: Audio playback continues uninterrupted

tests.scenario: Playback continues when screen is turned off
steps: Start a sleep session with calming audio
tests.expected_result: Audio playback continues uninterrupted

tests.scenario: Sleep session with ad-free content
steps: Verify the sleep session is playing ad-free content
tests.expected_result: No ads are displayed during the sleep session

tests.scenario: Sleep session with interrupted ad display
steps: Simulate an ad trigger during the session
tests.expected_result: The ad is not displayed, and the sleep content remains ad-free

tests.scenario: Valid meditation sessions count
steps: Count available sessions focused on anxiety and stress relief
tests.expected_result: At least 10 different meditation sessions are available

tests.scenario: Edge case - no meditation sessions
steps: Simulate no available sessions focused on anxiety and stress relief
tests.expected_result: The system displays an error message or a link to suggest new sessions

tests.scenario: Reopen a favorite support session with one favorite
steps: Save a support session as a favorite
tests.expected_result: The support session is reopened

tests.scenario: Reopen a favorite support session with multiple favorites
steps: Save multiple support sessions as favorites
tests.expected_result: The selected support session is reopened

tests.scenario: User has meditated for 5 consecutive days
steps: Log in as a user with 5 consecutive days of meditation
tests.expected_result: The app displays '5-day meditation streak' on the home screen

tests.scenario: User has not meditated for any consecutive days
steps: Log in as a user with no meditation history
tests.expected_result: The app displays '0-day meditation streak' or a relevant message on the home screen

tests.scenario: User completes a lesson in a meditation course
steps: Complete a lesson in the course
tests.expected_result: The user's course progress is updated, and the completed lesson is displayed

tests.scenario: User views their progress after completing multiple lessons
steps: Complete multiple lessons in the course
tests.expected_result: The app displays the list of completed lessons and the user's overall course progress

tests.scenario: Resume meditation after interruption on same device
steps: Interrupt the session by closing the app
tests.expected_result: The meditation session resumes from where it was interrupted

tests.scenario: Resume meditation on different device
steps: Start a meditation session on device A
Resume the meditation session on device B
tests.expected_result: The meditation session on device B resumes from where it was left off on device A

tests.scenario: User completes a lesson on device A, then signs in on device B
steps: Complete a lesson on device A
tests.expected_result: Updated streak count and completed lesson appear on device B within 60 seconds

tests.scenario: User completes a lesson on device A, then signs back in on device A
steps: Complete a lesson on device A
Sign out and sign back in on device A
tests.expected_result: Updated streak count and completed lesson appear on device A within 60 seconds
